summary: Theme park app featuring multiple attractions: haunted houses (Obsession Scream with character Leslie), shows (Color Paint 2028 kid-friendly show with 5 characters including Celeste the unicorn and Cosmo the dog), lands (Kid Grove 500,000 sq ft coming 2050), merch booth (Dead Eyes), and food booth (Paint & Death split booth)
architectural_notes: Theme park app with multiple attraction types: shows, haunted houses, lands, merch booths, and food booths
AI-generated character images for attraction characters
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Leslie character portrait: terrifying teen with long purple hair in horror atmosphere, dark background with ominous lighting (leslie-obsession-scream.dim_800x1000.png)
- Celeste the unicorn character: kid-friendly colorful unicorn with energetic pose for Color Paint show (celeste-unicorn.dim_600x600.png)
- Cosmo the dog character: high-energy kid-friendly dog character for Color Paint show (cosmo-dog.dim_600x600.png)
- Dead Eyes merch booth exterior: horror-themed merchandise shop with shoes, clothes, and autograph displays (dead-eyes-merch.dim_800x600.png)
- Paint & Death food booth: split design showing paint-themed side and death-themed side in one booth (paint-death-booth.dim_1000x700.png)

existing_features.title: Add a new kid-friendly show called 'Color Paint' scheduled for 2028 with 5 high-energy characters: Celeste the unicorn, Cosmo the dog, and 3 additional kid-friendly characters. Display in the Shows section with appropriate badge indicating it's a future show.
Add a new themed land called 'Kid Grove' coming in 2050 with 500,000 square feet. Indicate that Color Paint show will be located in this land. Display as an upcoming expansion announcement.
Add a new merchandise booth called 'Dead Eyes' that sells shoes, clothes, autographs, and additional merchandise items. Display in the Merch Shops section.

Add a new split-concept food booth combining paint-themed and death-themed cuisine. One side serves paint-themed menu items, the other serves death-themed items. Create complete menus for both sides with creative horror-appropriate food names and descriptions.

Add a new haunted house called 'Obsession Scream' featuring the character Leslie, a terrifying teen with long purple hair. Create a detailed description for both the haunted house and Leslie's character, emphasizing horror elements appropriate for a teen antagonist.
Generate an AI image of Leslie character: a terrifying teen with long purple hair in a horror context. Use this image for the Obsession Scream haunted house display.

new_feature_requests.summary: Add Color Paint show (2028) with 5 kid-friendly characters including Celeste the unicorn and Cosmo the dog
Add Kid Grove land (500,000 sq ft, coming 2050) to house Color Paint show
Add Dead Eyes merch booth selling shoes, clothes, autographs, and more
Add Paint & Death split food booth with menus for both paint-themed and death-themed sides
Add Obsession Scream haunted house with character Leslie (terrifying teen with long purple hair)
